tasks.subject: Task 1: Define create_visit tool + extend stream types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create tool definition and StreamChunk union that the rest depends on.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/ai/tools.ts`
- Modify: `src/lib/ai/types.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] VISIT_TOOLS exported with create_visit function tool
- [ ] Tool schema has restaurantName (required) + date, mealType, rating, note (optional)
- [ ] StreamChunk discriminated union added to types.ts
- [ ] StreamRequest has optional tools field

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck` → no errors

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extend openrouterClient to parse tool calls
tasks.description:
**Goal:** streamChat passes tools to OpenRouter and yields StreamChunk instead of raw strings.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/lib/ai/openrouterClient.ts`
- Modify: `src/lib/ai/openrouterClient.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] streamChat return type is AsyncGenerator<StreamChunk>
- [ ] Tools array included in request body when provided
- [ ] Content deltas yield { type: 'content', delta } chunks
- [ ] Tool call args accumulated, single tool_call chunk yielded on [DONE]
- [ ] All existing and new tests pass

**Verify:** `npm test -- openrouterClient` → all tests pass

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add create_visit instruction to system prompt
tasks.description:
**Goal:** LLM knows it has a create_visit tool and when to use it.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/lib/ai/buildChatContext.ts`
- Modify: `src/lib/ai/buildChatContext.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] System prompt instructs LLM to call create_visit when user wants to log a visit
- [ ] Only ask for restaurantName if missing
- [ ] Default to today if no date mentioned
- [ ] Test verifies instruction present in built context

**Verify:** `npm test -- buildChatContext` → all tests pass

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update useAssistantChat to manage pendingVisit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hook handles StreamChunk union, detects tool calls, stores pendingVisit, exposes confirmVisit/cancelVisit.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/hooks/useAssistantChat.ts`
- Modify: `src/hooks/useAssistantChat.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] pendingVisit: CreateVisitArgs | null exposed from hook
- [ ] tool_call chunk sets pendingVisit
- [ ] confirmVisit(addVisit) calls addVisit with defaults then clears draft
- [ ] cancelVisit() clears draft
- [ ] send() clears draft before sending
- [ ] All existing tests pass

**Verify:** `npm test -- useAssistantChat` → all tests pass

tasks.subject: Task 5: Render VisitDraftCard in AssistantChat
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When pendingVisit is set, chat renders inline card with draft fields, Confirm and Cancel buttons.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/AssistantChat.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] AssistantChat accepts addVisit prop
- [ ] VisitDraftCard renders when pendingVisit is non-null
- [ ] Card shows restaurant, date, mealType, rating flames, note
- [ ] Confirm calls confirmVisit(addVisit), Cancel calls cancelVisit
- [ ] Call sites updated to pass addVisit prop

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck && npm run build` → no errors

metadata.verifyCommand: npm run typecheck && npm run build
